query: mixed color temperature sodium vapor orange streetlight clashing fluorescent night urban
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: mixed color temp — sodium vapor orange vs blue twilight, clashing artificial light sources, desolate urban night

response.objective_caption: A nighttime photograph of a wide, empty concrete plaza beneath an elevated highway overpass. Overhead lights create starburst patterns and illuminate the paved surface and rows of thick concrete support pillars. Parallel structural beams line the underside of the bridge deck, stretching horizontally across the frame. In the distance, illuminated signs and buildings are visible at the far end of the underpass.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A nighttime photograph of a wide, empty concrete plaza beneath an elevated highway overpass, suffused with a sickly yellow sodium vapor cast that lends the concrete surfaces an unhealthy, unsettling hue. Overhead lights create starburst patterns and illuminate the paved surface and rows of thick concrete support pillars. Parallel structural beams line the underside of the bridge deck, stretching horizontally across the frame. In the distance, illuminated signs and buildings are visible at the far end of the underpass.
